title: Workforms: How do I change the mapping of a column to a form question
excerpt: I have set up a form where the first question maps to the first column, as expected. However, I now realise that I need the first column (which is the ‘item’) to be created from a question further down the form. I don’t …

posts.author: Robynne (Robynne)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have set up a form where the first question maps to the first column, as expected. However, I now realise that I need the first column (which is the ‘item’) to be created from a question further down the form. I don’t want to change the order of the questions.
I’ve seen in another question that you can see the mapping when you edit the form, thought this option isn’t showing on my form (only the move the question up or down arrows).
Even if I could see that, would it allow me to change the mapping to another field in the form?
Is there a way of changing the mapping? What if I started from scratch with the first question being the one I ultimately want, then later move the question on the form?

thanks!
